pr-evidence/databricks-dbfs-upload-helpe.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5/high reviewer Arendt found that the upload sidecar could be recomputed from changed bytes and that the legacy DBFS size-limit constant missed import-order isolation; both were fixed with regression tests.
verification: python -m pytest -q tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_repository_hygiene.py -> 117 passed
installed-wheel fake-opener smoke for put_databricks_dbfs_file and cachet-databricks-runs put-dbfs-file --help -> passed
what_changed: Added Cachet-owned Databricks DBFS small-file artifact staging via put_databricks_dbfs_file and cachet-databricks-runs put-dbfs-file.
Normalized dbfs:/ artifact URIs to Databricks REST API absolute DBFS paths while recording canonical URI, API path, bytes, and SHA-256 provenance.
Exposed the staging helper through cachet/document_kv_cache and legacy restaurant_kv_serving facades with compatibility and token-hygiene tests.
pr-evidence/databricks-dbfs-upload-helpe.why: The g6 provider-backed probe path needs a Cachet-owned way to stage the generated runner and small wheel artifacts before launching Databricks jobs, without putting credentials in command arguments or logs.
